message:
feat(robot): implement alerting system for health events (ntm-caib)

Add comprehensive alerting system for agent health state changes:
- Desktop notifications: macOS (osascript) and Linux (notify-send)
- Webhook delivery with exponential backoff retry
- Structured JSON logging to stderr
- Debouncing to prevent alert spam (configurable interval)
- Event filtering (configure which events trigger alerts)
- Helper methods: SendStateChange, SendRestart, SendMaxRestarts

Alert types: unhealthy, degraded, rate_limited, restart, restart_failed,
max_restarts, recovered

Includes comprehensive test suite (14 tests).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
